title: teucrium cubense var. laevigatum
intro: Teucrium cubense var. laevigatum, a lesser-known variety of the Teucrium cubense plant, is a type of herbaceous perennial native to the Mediterranean region, also known as Cuban germander. The medicinal properties of Teucrium cubense var. laevigatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Teucrium cubense var. laevigatum has been prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
